vocabulary.definition: n. 八月；adj. 威严的, 令人敬畏的
vocabulary.context: Michael and Sean McQuilken, ages eighteen and twelve, took a snapshot up there on August 20, 1975 and it turned out pretty funny, with electricity-charged air around them lifting their hair over their heads.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 十八岁和十二岁的迈克尔·麦克奎尔肯和肖恩·麦克奎尔肯于 1975 年 8 月 20 日在那里拍了一张快照，结果非常有趣，他们周围的带电空气将头发举过头顶

vocabulary.definition: n. 太空行走
vocabulary.context: Astronauts can do science experiments on a spacewalk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宇航员可以在太空行走中进行科学实验

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 解下拴牛马的绳或链
vocabulary.context: If an astronaut were to become untethered and float away, SAFER would help him or her fly back to the spacecraft.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果宇航员脱离束缚并飘走，SAFER 将帮助他或她飞回航天器

vocabulary.definition: adj. 气密的, 不透气的, 无懈可击的；[机] 气密, 不透气
vocabulary.context: When astronauts are inside the spacecraft, the airlock is airtight so no air can get out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当宇航员在航天器内时，气闸室是密闭的，因此空气无法逸出

vocabulary.definition: n. 气塞, 气闸, 气密舱；[化] 风闸; 气封; 气窝(塑料表面的)
vocabulary.context: They leave the spacecraft through a special door called an airlock.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们通过一扇称为气闸室的特殊门离开航天器

vocabulary.definition: n. (飞机的)操纵杆；[计] 控制杆, 操纵杆
vocabulary.context: Astronauts control safer with a small joystick, like on a video game.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宇航员使用小操纵杆可以更安全地进行控制，就像玩电子游戏一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 向上钻营的人, 推进器
vocabulary.context: It uses small jet thrusters to let an astronaut move around in space.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它使用小型喷气推进器让宇航员在太空中移动

vocabulary.definition: n. 潜水者
vocabulary.context: This pain is called getting "the bends" because it affects the places where the body bends, Scuba divers can also get "the bends."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种疼痛被称为"弯曲"，因为它影响身体弯曲的地方，水肺潜水员也会出现"弯曲"

vocabulary.definition: n. 钩, 钩状, 镰刀, 陷阱；v.t. 挂...于钩上, 钩住, 引上钩, 偷窃；v.i. 弯成钩状, 钩紧；[计] 钩
vocabulary.context: One end is hooked to the spacewalker.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一端挂在太空行走者上

vocabulary.definition: v. 连接, 联合, 联系
vocabulary.context: The other end is connected to the vehicle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一端连接至车辆

vocabulary.definition: n. 共有人, 共同所有人；[经] 共有人
vocabulary.context: In 2000 he became co-owner of the Washington Wizards, an NBA team that plays in Washington, D.C.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2000年，他成为华盛顿奇才队的共同所有者，这是一支在华盛顿特区打球的NBA球队

vocabulary.definition: n. 记录员, 刻痕者
vocabulary.context: In the next season he passed Wilt Chamberlain to take third place on the list of the NBA's all-time top scorers, behind Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Karl Malone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在接下来的赛季中，他超越威尔特·张伯伦 (Wilt Chamberlain)，在 NBA 历史最佳得分手名单上排名第三，仅次于卡里姆·阿卜杜尔·贾巴尔 (Kareem Abdul-Jabbar) 和卡尔·马龙 (Karl Malone)

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 浸一浸, 泡一泡
vocabulary.context: He was called Air Jordan because of how he soared toward the basket for spectacular slam dunks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他被称为"飞人乔丹"，因为他能够飞向篮筐，完成精彩的扣篮

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全部时间的, 空前的, 创记录的
vocabulary.context: In the next season he passed Wilt Chamberlain to take third place on the list of the NBA's all-time top scorers, behind Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Karl Malone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在接下来的赛季中，他超越威尔特·张伯伦 (Wilt Chamberlain)，在 NBA 历史最佳得分手名单上排名第三，仅次于卡里姆·阿卜杜尔·贾巴尔 (Kareem Abdul-Jabbar) 和卡尔·马龙 (Karl Malone)

vocabulary.definition: n. 退休, 隐居, 撤退；[经] 退休, 退股, (固定资产)报废
vocabulary.context: Washington Wizards and Retirement
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 华盛顿奇才队和退役

vocabulary.definition: adj. 防卫的, 防备用的, 自卫的；n. 守势, 防卫姿势, 防卫物
vocabulary.context: In 1988 he was also named defensive player of the year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1988年他还被评为年度最佳防守球员

vocabulary.definition: n. 所有权, 物主身份；[经] 所有权, 所有制
vocabulary.context: In September 2001 he gave up his ownership and management positions with the Wizards to become a player on the team.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2001年9月，他放弃了奇才队的所有权和管理职位，成为球队的一名球员

vocabulary.definition: n. 经营, 支配, 管理；[化] 管理处
vocabulary.context: He also took a management position with the team.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他还在团队中担任管理职务

vocabulary.definition: n. 专业人才；adj. 专业的, 职业的
vocabulary.context: Before becoming a professional athlete (someone who earns money by playing a sport), Jordan led the U.S.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在成为职业运动员（通过运动赚钱的人）之前，乔丹领导了美国

vocabulary.definition: n. 主页
vocabulary.context: He returned to the homepage and saw a tab Taking care of your wristband .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他回到首页，看到了一个标签"照顾你的腕带"

vocabulary.definition: n. 爬行者
vocabulary.context: The creeper is right behind you."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 苦力怕就在你身后。"

vocabulary.definition: n. (一副)耳机；[电] 头载机组
vocabulary.context: Both his parents now wore headsets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的父母现在都戴着耳机

vocabulary.definition: n. 袖口
vocabulary.context: Just fill in our online order form, and we'll send your wristband the very next day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 只需填写我们的在线订单，我们就会在第二天发送给您的腕带

vocabulary.definition: adv. 违反习俗地; 不自然地; 勉强地; 不近人情地
vocabulary.context: A balding man with an unnaturally huge grin appeared on the screen and started speaking in a recorded voice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个带着不自然的笑容的秃头男子出现在屏幕上，并开始用录音说话

vocabulary.definition: n. 发话筒, 代言人, (电话)送话口；[机] 钳口垫片
vocabulary.context: Cooper's mom covered the mouthpiece and spoke to him out of the side of her mouth without tearing her eyes away from the screen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 库珀的妈妈盖住了话筒，从嘴边对他说话，眼睛却没有离开屏幕

vocabulary.definition: adj. 昏昏欲睡的；[医] 倦睡的, 瞌睡的
vocabulary.context: She shook her head and spoke in a drowsy voice as if she'd just woken up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她摇摇头，用睡眼惺忪的声音说话，就像刚睡醒一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 狂吼, 狂暴；v. 愤怒地说, 叫嚷, 咆哮
vocabulary.context: His mom was working the controls furiously while raving about slaying the Dunder Dragon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的妈妈一边疯狂地操作控制器，一边热衷于杀死邓德龙

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使移动, 搅乱, 使动摇, 使不安宁；v.i. 动荡不定, 离开固定位置
vocabulary.context: An unsettling beat began playing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 令人不安的节拍开始响起

vocabulary.definition: n. 银器
vocabulary.context: It did not taste great, but since they did not need to take dishes or silverware with them, they had no dishes to wash.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 味道不太好，但由于他们不需要随身携带碗碟或银器，所以他们没有碗要洗

vocabulary.definition: n. 玉米饼
vocabulary.context: They package the tortillas in an oxygen-free wrap so they stay safe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们将玉米饼包装在无氧包装中，以保证其安全

vocabulary.definition: adj. 咬的, 啮齿类的；n. 啮齿动物
vocabulary.context: They do not have to worry about mice or other rodents.They make sure that there are no rodents before the ship leaves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们不必担心老鼠或其他啮齿动物。他们在船出发前确保没有啮齿动物

vocabulary.definition: n. 谷类食品, 谷类植物；adj. 谷类的
vocabulary.context: In fact, they take cereal and other standard foods with them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，他们随身携带谷物和其他标准食物

vocabulary.definition: n. 叉子, 叉状物, 分岔；v.i. 分支, 分歧；v.t. 做成叉形, 叉起；[计] 派生指令
vocabulary.context: They use knives, forks, and spoons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们使用刀、叉和勺子

vocabulary.definition: n. 抽屉, 小柜, 上锁人；[机] 锁柜
vocabulary.context: The astronauts keep bread and fresh fruits and vegetables in a special food locker.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宇航员将面包和新鲜水果和蔬菜存放在一个特殊的食品柜中

vocabulary.definition: n. 容器, 集装箱；[化] 集装箱; 贮存箱; 容器(任何一种)
vocabulary.context: The foods are packaged in special containers to keep them fresh.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些食品被包装在特殊的容器中以保持新鲜

vocabulary.definition: n. 盘子, 碟, 菜肴；[医] 皿, 碟
vocabulary.context: It did not taste great, but since they did not need to take dishes or silverware with them, they had no dishes to wash.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 味道不太好，但由于他们不需要随身携带碗碟或银器，所以他们没有碗要洗

vocabulary.definition: n. 塑料, 可塑体, 可塑性物质；adj. 塑料的, 塑造的, 有可塑性的, 造型的, 易受影响的, 有创造力的
vocabulary.context: They pack wet wipes in plastic bags.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们把湿巾装在塑料袋里

vocabulary.definition: n. 椭圆, 椭圆形；[计] 椭圆
vocabulary.context: All travel in a pattern called an ellipse, which is a kind of oval.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有的运动都以一种称为椭圆的模式进行，这是椭圆形的一种

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不屈不挠的, 大胆的
vocabulary.context: It is dangerous to travel in space, but they are dauntless.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 太空旅行很危险，但他们无所畏惧

vocabulary.definition: n. （热带）雨林( rainforest的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: There are rainforests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有雨林

vocabulary.definition: n. 水银, 汞, 使者；[化] 汞Hg
vocabulary.context: Two other planets are closer to the sun than Earth: Mercury and Venus.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另外两颗行星比地球更靠近太阳：水星和金星

vocabulary.definition: n. 十亿（billion的复数形式）
vocabulary.context: a system of millions or billions of stars held together by gravity Scientists figured out how the Earth changes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由数百万或数十亿颗恒星通过重力聚集在一起的系统科学家们弄清楚了地球是如何变化的

vocabulary.definition: n. 太空旅行者, 宇航员；[法] 美国太空人
vocabulary.context: Scientists are still learning about our galaxy. There is much to discover. Today astronauts travel into space. They are explorers. It is dangerous to travel in space, but they are dauntless. They bravely travel thousands of miles to learn.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家们仍在了解我们的星系。有很多东西有待发现。今天，宇航员进入太空。他们是探险家。太空旅行很危险，但他们无所畏惧。他们勇敢地跋涉万里去学习

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不同的, 变化多的
vocabulary.context: It is very diverse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它非常多样化

vocabulary.definition: n. 目标, 靶子, 指标；v.t. 对准, 订指标
vocabulary.context: It is Flyby Target" by NASA is licensed under CC BY- very big.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是 NASA 的"飞越目标"，已获得 CC BY 许可 - 非常大

vocabulary.definition: n. 小声说的话, 旁白；adv. 在一边, 离开, 另外
vocabulary.context: Dedicate(verb)to set aside time to do something 4.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奉献（动词）留出时间做某事 4.

vocabulary.definition: n. [植]多刺疏林,多刺高灌丛,山楂林
vocabulary.context: Zebra flicked his ears and peered into a thornbush.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斑马甩动耳朵，凝视着荆棘丛

vocabulary.definition: n. 斑马
vocabulary.context: One sunny morning, Zebra visited the river to get a cool drink.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个阳光明媚的早晨，斑马来到河边喝点清凉的饮料

vocabulary.definition: v. 刺, 戳, 猛击；n. 刺, 戳, 猛击
vocabulary.context: But the thorns jabbed his lips.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但荆棘刺痛了他的嘴唇

vocabulary.definition: n. 疾驰, 飞奔；v.i. 飞驰, 急速进行, 急急忙忙地说；v.t. 使飞跑, 迅速运输
vocabulary.context: "I might not be nearby the next time a spider gets hungry." Then Zebra turned around and galloped back to his herd.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "下次蜘蛛饥饿时我可能不在附近。"然后斑马转身跑回了他的兽群

vocabulary.definition: n. 刺, 棘, 荆棘
vocabulary.context: But the thorns jabbed his lips.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但荆棘刺痛了他的嘴唇

vocabulary.definition: v. 用力咀嚼, 大声咀嚼
vocabulary.context: They quietly munched on grass.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们静静地嚼着草

vocabulary.definition: n. 恸哭, 哀号, 嚎啕, 呼啸(声)；v.i. 恸哭, 呼啸, 悲叹, 哀号, 嚎啕
vocabulary.context: "Ouch!" wailed Zebra. He jerked his head back. "If I save you, I'll hurt myself."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哎哟！斑马哀嚎道。他猛地回头。 "如果我救你，我就会伤害自己。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 性情古怪的人, 急拉, 肌肉抽搐, 牛肉干；v.i. 痉挛, 急拉, 急推；v.t. 猛拉
vocabulary.context: He jerked his head back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他猛地回头

vocabulary.definition: prep. 除...之外；adv. 而且, 此外
vocabulary.context: Besides, I have a whole herd of friends.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，我还有一大群朋友

vocabulary.definition: n. 短吻鳄
vocabulary.context: As Kylie scooped up the ball, a Gator safely crossed home plate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当凯莉捡起球时，一只鳄鱼安全地越过了本垒

vocabulary.definition: n. 农宅周围的田园, 耕地, 内野
vocabulary.context: The ball would bounce to the infield or fly high and drop into the pitcher's glove.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 球会弹到内场或飞得很高并落入投手的手套中

vocabulary.definition: n. 药蒲公英；[化] 蒲公英
vocabulary.context: Something on the ground caught her eye - a perfectly round dandelion, with seeds waiting to be blown into the wind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地上的东西引起了她的注意--一朵完美的蒲公英，种子正等待着被风吹走

vocabulary.definition: n. 打手, 打击的人
vocabulary.context: Courtney, the Gators' best hitter, had sent the softball sailing through the air above.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 考特尼，鳄鱼队最好的击球手，将垒球打到了空中

vocabulary.definition: n. 灰尘, 尘埃, 粉末, 花粉, 土, 骚乱；v.t. 拂去灰尘, 撒, 弄成粉末；v.i. 拂去灰尘, 化为粉末
vocabulary.context: Courtney slid toward the plate, and Samantha dusted the plate with her glove.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 考特尼滑向盘子，萨曼莎用手套掸去盘子上的灰尘

vocabulary.definition: n. 暴跌, 垂头弯腰的姿态；v.i. 猛然掉落, 陷入, 衰落(经济等)
vocabulary.context: Kylie slumped onto the bench.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯莉瘫倒在长凳上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 转移, 分心, 使发狂
vocabulary.context: "I guess I got distracted," Kylie admitted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我想我分心了，"凯莉承认

vocabulary.definition: n. 手腕, 腕关节；[医] 腕
vocabulary.context: Jasmine wound up the pitch, snapped her wrist, and let the ball fly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 茉莉花在球场上打响，折断手腕，让球飞了起来

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 承认, 接受, 允许进入, 容许；v.i. 开向, 容许, 承认
vocabulary.context: "I guess I got distracted," Kylie admitted.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我想我分心了，"凯莉承认

vocabulary.definition: n. 脱离, (美)(非正式)一碰就散开/脱落的, 分裂
vocabulary.context: I had a breakaway up the side.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我在侧面突破了

vocabulary.definition: n. 闩, 横木, 球门的横木
vocabulary.context: Lina's shot hit the crossbar, bounced down then spun into the goal.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莉娜的射门击中横梁，弹起然后旋转入球门

vocabulary.definition: n. 球场中央部分；adj. 中场的
vocabulary.context: At the game, I started at midfield.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 比赛中，我首发中场

vocabulary.definition: n. 补充人员, 部下, 潜水艇, 胶层, 订户, 傻子；adj. 附属的, 次级的；v.t. 替代, 转包；v.i. 替代；[计] 子程式, 用户, 代替, 减法器
vocabulary.context: A few minutes later, Lina was subbed in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几分钟后，莉娜被换下

vocabulary.definition: n. 中场休息
vocabulary.context: The ref blew the whistle for halftime.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 裁判吹响了半场结束的哨声

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 流口水, 滴下；v.t. 使滴下, 运球；n. 点滴, 口水, 少量
vocabulary.context: Lina dribbled her soccer ball onto the field.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莉娜将她的足球运到了球场上

vocabulary.definition: n. 副业, 旁线, 界线, 兼职, 旁观者看法；v.t. 使退出比赛场地
vocabulary.context: If you miss, you go back to the sidelines and wait for another challenge."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你错过了，你就回到场边等待下一次挑战。"

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 爆发；v.t. 喷出
vocabulary.context: Our team erupted into cheers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们队爆发出欢呼声

vocabulary.definition: n. 街区, 木块, 石块, 块；v.t. 阻塞, 封锁, 使成块状；[计] 块, 数据块
vocabulary.context: She blocked all of Tori's shots.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她挡住了托里的所有投篮

vocabulary.definition: v. 胸腹先着水的跳水
vocabulary.context: To try to figure out why tailed frogs belly-flop, Essner and other scientists collected and filmed different kinds of frogs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了试图弄清楚为什么尾蛙会翻肚皮，埃斯纳和其他科学家收集并拍摄了不同种类的青蛙

vocabulary.definition: v. 胸腹先着水的跳水（belly-flop的第三人称单数形式）
vocabulary.context: But did you know that there's a tiny frog in the Pacific Northwest that belly-flops?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是你知道太平洋西北部有一种会翻肚皮的小青蛙吗？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高速的
vocabulary.context: "I've looked at thousands of jumps with high-speed video and have never seen them land on their feet like other frogs," Essner says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我用高速视频观察了数千次跳跃，但从未见过它们像其他青蛙一样用脚落地，"埃斯纳说

vocabulary.definition: n. 半空中
vocabulary.context: The change comes in midair and in the landing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 变化发生在空中和着陆时

vocabulary.definition: adj. 水的, 湿的, 平淡的, 稀薄的, 水淋淋的
vocabulary.context: Early frogs developed around watery areas and could jump quickly into water to escape from predators.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 早期的青蛙是在水域周围发育的，可以快速跳入水中以躲避捕食者

vocabulary.definition: n. 游泳者
vocabulary.context: The way the tailed frogs jump might explain why they are not graceful swimmers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尾蛙跳跃的方式或许可以解释为什么它们不是优雅的游泳者

vocabulary.definition: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；adj. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的；v.t. 为...装尾, 附于其后, 尾随, 使搭牢, 跟踪, 监视；v.i. 跟踪, 船尾搁浅
vocabulary.context: It's called a tailed frog.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它被称为尾蛙

vocabulary.definition: adv. 很快地, 即刻
vocabulary.context: Tailed frogs live around water and swiftly jump into the water to escape danger.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尾蛙生活在水边，遇到危险时会迅速跳入水中

vocabulary.definition: n. 影像, 电视；adj. 图像的, 电视的
vocabulary.context: "I've looked at thousands of jumps with high-speed video and have never seen them land on their feet like other frogs," Essner says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我用高速视频观察了数千次跳跃，但从未见过它们像其他青蛙一样用脚落地，"埃斯纳说

vocabulary.definition: n. [医]胃石
vocabulary.context: Or you might find a gastrolith, a round, smooth, shiny stone that once spent time in a dinosaur's stomach, helping it grind up its dinner of plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者你可能会发现胃石，一种圆形、光滑、闪亮的石头，曾经在恐龙的胃里呆过一段时间，帮助它磨碎植物晚餐

vocabulary.definition: n. 沙岩；[化] 砂岩
vocabulary.context: It's probably sandstone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 可能是砂岩

vocabulary.definition: n. 黑曜石
vocabulary.context: Did you pick up a piece of shiny black obsidian?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你捡到一块闪亮的黑色黑曜石了吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 海底
vocabulary.context: Long-ago oceans were full of animals, little and big; when they died, their shells and skeletons sank to the seafloor and formed limestone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很久以前，海洋里充满了大大小小的动物；当它们死后，它们的壳和骨骼沉入海底并形成石灰岩

vocabulary.definition: adj. 惊呆的; 目瞪口呆的；v. 使吓呆, 使惊呆; 变僵硬; 使石化(petrify的过去式和过去分词)
vocabulary.context: Or you might find a piece of petrified wood, made from a tree that died in an ancient forest.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者您可能会找到一块硅化木，它是由古老森林中死去的树制成的

vocabulary.definition: n. 海绵, 海绵状的东西；v.t. 用海绵擦拭, 吸收掉, 抹掉；v.i. 采集海绵, 海绵般吸收
vocabulary.context: In limestone you might see fossil sponges or corals, or even the shell of an animal that is now extinct.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在石灰岩中，您可能会看到海绵或珊瑚化石，甚至是现已灭绝的动物的壳

vocabulary.definition: n. 腐烂, 腐蚀, 败坏；v.i. 腐烂, 烂, 堕落, 憔悴；v.t. 使腐烂, 使腐朽, 使堕落
vocabulary.context: When mud covered the fallen tree, minerals that were dissolved in the water slowly seeped into the rotting wood and made an exact copy of it in hard rock.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当泥土覆盖倒下的树时，溶解在水中的矿物质慢慢渗入腐烂的木头，并在坚硬的岩石中精确复制它

vocabulary.definition: n. 船, 容器, 脉管；[医] 管, 脉管, (容)器
vocabulary.context: If it's bone, tiny holes where blood vessels once ran will usually make her tongue stick a little.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果是骨头，血管曾经流过的小孔通常会让她的舌头有点粘住

vocabulary.definition: adv. 深刻地, 在深处, 深沉地
vocabulary.context: Then it once spent time far underground, where heat from deeply buried lava, called magma, can help crystals grow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后它曾经在地下深处度过一段时间，深埋的熔岩（称为岩浆）产生的热量可以帮助晶体生长

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 示范, 证明；v.i. 示威

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 鼓励, 支持, 激励；[法] 怂恿, 煽动, 助长

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴罗尼鼓励地点点头

vocabulary.definition: n. 记分板

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我回到场上的位置时，我检查了记分牌

vocabulary.definition: n. 从事安装的人, 调节器, (警察)眼线

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你猜怎么着，萨拉，"我们的二传手佐伊慢吞吞地说

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你猜怎么着，萨拉，"我们的二传手佐伊慢吞吞地说

vocabulary.definition: n. 排球

vocabulary.definition: n. 重振旗鼓, 集合, 群众集会, 跌停回升；v. 重整旗鼓, 集合, 恢复精神, 团结, 挖苦, 嘲笑
vocabulary.context: We still couldn't win this second game of the match, but we could have a rally - one that would keep that middle blocker from yawning again.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们仍然无法赢得比赛的第二场比赛，但我们可以进行一场反弹--这将使中间的拦网手不再打哈欠

vocabulary.definition: n. 法官, 裁判员, 审判官, 鉴定人；v.t. 审理, 鉴定, 判断, 判决, 裁定；v.i. 下判断, 作评价

vocabulary.definition: n. 猎豹

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 查克这个年龄段的其他猎豹非常努力地想办法打败他

vocabulary.definition: n. 空中；半空中

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每次他总是获胜的比赛结束时，查克都会跳起来，在半空中扭动身体，欢快地唱着："我所做的就是赢，赢，赢，赢，赢！"

vocabulary.definition: v. 大声地嚼, 格格地咬；n. 格格地嚼, 咀嚼声

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "奇普是冠军，奇普是冠军，"每个人都尖叫着

vocabulary.definition: adv. 优雅地；温文地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你需要接受失败并优雅地失去，"明智的老猎豹告诉他

vocabulary.definition: n. 吹牛；v.i. 吹牛, 自夸；v.t. 夸口说, 自恃有

vocabulary.definition: adv. 偶然地, 意外地
vocabulary.context: Just as they were nearing the finish line and Chuck was racing to catch up with Chum and Chip, Chuck accidentally stepped on a thorn.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正当他们接近终点线时，查克正在追赶查姆和奇普，查克不小心踩到了一根刺

vocabulary.definition: n. 胜利者, 优胜者；[法] 取胜者

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这意味着，即使你输了，你仍然可以为胜利者感到高兴

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 赢得, 打胜, 成功；v.i. 获胜, 达到, 影响；n. 胜利, 赢, 收益
vocabulary.context: Chuck was so sure of winning that he told all the cheetahs that he would give them a 10-second head start.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 查克对获胜充满信心，他告诉所有猎豹，他会给他们 10 秒的领先优势

vocabulary.definition: n. 无安打球赛

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那天，吉姆投出了无安打，这意味着整场比赛中对方球队没有击球手安打

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当人们看到吉姆在棒球方面有多出色时，他们忘记了他是一只手

vocabulary.definition: n. 棒球手
vocabulary.context: Jim's parents knew that Jim was a good ballplayer, too, but they didn't know he was great.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 吉姆的父母也知道吉姆是一名优秀的棒球运动员，但他们不知道他很伟大

vocabulary.definition: n. 一局, 挨次轮换, 执政期, 围垦

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他投了每一局并赢得了比赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 大, 巨大, 广大

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 投出无安打比赛是伟大的标志

vocabulary.definition: n. 队友

vocabulary.definition: n. 记者, 报告者；[化] 指示器

vocabulary.definition: num. 十一, 十一个

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 完成, 达到；v.i. 如愿以偿

vocabulary.definition: n. 礼貌, 谦恭, 好意；[法] 优待, 礼貌, 恩惠

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 明天我们计划去月球荡秋千！

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在选举日，人们通常会去投票站投票

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们使用机器做出选择，或者在称为选票的表格上标记他们的选择

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 候选人经常在电视上发表演讲和投放广告

vocabulary.definition: adj. 一流的, 最高的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布鲁克林道奇队主席布兰奇·里基（Branch Rickey）有兴趣让大联盟棒球向黑人球员开放

vocabulary.definition: n. (棒球)内野手
vocabulary.context: He played as an infielder and outfielder for the Brooklyn Dodgers from 1947 through 1956.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从 1947 年到 1956 年，他在布鲁克林道奇队担任内野手和外野手

vocabulary.definition: n. 外野手
vocabulary.context: He played as an infielder and outfielder for the Brooklyn Dodgers from 1947 through 1956.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从 1947 年到 1956 年，他在布鲁克林道奇队担任内野手和外野手

vocabulary.definition: n. 尖旗, 三角旗, 三角锦旗, 三角信号旗
vocabulary.context: Robinson helped the Dodgers win six National League pennants and one World Series title.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗宾逊帮助道奇队赢得了六枚国家联盟锦旗和一个世界大赛冠军

vocabulary.definition: adj. 憎恨的, 可恨的, 可恶的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 球员和人群中的人经常对他喊出可恶的话

vocabulary.definition: n. 帝王, 统治者, 元首；[医] 单原型(植)

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 离开陆军后，罗宾逊为堪萨斯城君主队打棒球

vocabulary.definition: n. 商人, 实业家, 工商业家
vocabulary.context: Robinson then became a businessman and worked for civil rights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗宾逊随后成为一名商人并为民权事业而努力

vocabulary.definition: n. 黑人；adj. 黑人的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该队隶属于美国黑人联盟

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有价值的, 贵重的, 宝贵的, 可估价的；[经] 有价值的, 可估价的, 贵重的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1949年，他被选为国家联盟最有价值球员

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 之后，盲文故事的副本被压印

vocabulary.context: Louis got sicker. But he kept on inventing. In 1839, he invented another system of dots. It helped the blind write letters. They wrote to people who could see. Braille's students were so happy! They could write to their families. And their families could write back. They could never do that before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 路易斯病情加重。但他继续发明。 1839年，他发明了另一种点系统。它帮助盲人写信。他们写信给看得见的人。盲文的学生们太高兴了！他们可以写信给家人。他们的家人可以回信。以前他们绝对做不到

vocabulary.definition: adj. 重大的, 显要的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我刚开始做生意时，我妈妈会用西班牙语对我说："Mi' jita, empieza pequeño, pero piensa grande"（我亲爱的小家伙，从小事做起，但要胸怀大志）

vocabulary.definition: n. 飞机场；[机] 航空站, 机场

vocabulary.definition: adj. 患佝偻病的, 虚弱的, 摇摆的；[医] 佝偻病的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在山顶上，他看到一座摇摇欲坠的建筑

vocabulary.definition: n. 副主祭, 执事, 行会会长；v.t. 朗读, 摆得好看些
vocabulary.context: "Let me hear you wail," said Deacon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "让我听听你的哭声，"迪肯说

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 解散, 开除, 解职；v.i. 解散；[计] 解散

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学校停课了。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 六角形, 六边形；[机] 六角, 六角形, 六角边

vocabulary.definition: n. 废纸篓；[计] 废纸篓

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他把它们举到废纸篓上时，它们突然让他想起了一件事

vocabulary.definition: n. 木柴

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当孩子们走向柴火堆时，布莱恩模仿了杜鲁门的步伐

vocabulary.definition: n. 凹痕；v.t. 使凹下, 削弱；v.i. 塌陷

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他抱起一抱有凹痕的管子，把它们扔到正在开动的水龙头下，然后抽泣着跑进客厅

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 冲口说出, 脱口说出

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我正在努力把盘子吃完！"杜鲁门脱口而出

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 伸开手足躺, 爬行, 蔓生, 蔓延；v.t. 懒散地伸开, 使蔓生, 使不规则地伸展；n. 伸开手足躺卧姿势

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杜鲁门推开前门，发现他四岁的弟弟布莱恩躺在客厅的地毯上，正在努力工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 分配, 功课, 任务, 转让, 归因, 陈述；[计] 赋值

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不知怎的，在放假前只剩下一周和一项作业的情况下，他和雷切尔打成了平手

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 曾祖父

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 里面有一张曾祖父的小照片

vocabulary.definition: n. 食物, 养料；[医] 食物, 食品

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 叫喊, 大叫, (齐声)呐喊欢呼；v.t. 喊叫着说；n. 叫声, 喊声, 呐喊

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使失望

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他不能让他失望

vocabulary.definition: n. 蜂房, 闹区, 蜜蜂群；v.i. 进入蜂房, 储藏蜜于蜂房, 如蜂般群居；v.t. 使进蜂房, 储备；[计] 蜂巢

vocabulary.context: When we use it, a honey guide will come and lead us to a hidden beehive." He handed Guyo the shell.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们使用它时，蜂蜜向导会过来，带我们到一个隐藏的蜂巢。"他把贝壳递给Guyo

vocabulary.definition: n. 琥珀, 琥珀色；adj. 琥珀色的, 琥珀似的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他竭尽全力，拉出了一块又一块滴着粘稠的琥珀色蜂蜜的蜂窝

vocabulary.definition: n. 用力拉, 拖曳, 苦干, 挣扎, 绳索；v. 用力拉
vocabulary.context: Reaching as far as he could, he tugged out chunk after chunk of honeycomb dripping with sticky amber honey.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他竭尽全力，拉出了一块又一块滴着粘稠的琥珀色蜂蜜的蜂窝

vocabulary.definition: adj. 后面的；v.t. 使后退, 支持；v.i. 倒退, 背靠；adv. 向后地；n. 背部, 后面

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当蜜蜂再次开始嗡嗡作响时，他们离开了蜂巢

vocabulary.definition: n. 守卫者, 警戒, 护卫队, 防护装置；v.t. 保卫, 看守, 当心；v.i. 防止, 警惕, 警卫, 看守

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一群愤怒的蜜蜂守卫着入口

vocabulary.definition: adj. 极好的, 可爱的, 令人愉快的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: Pendragon，蜥蜴，是一种冷血爬行动物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 侵入的, 侵略性的, 攻击性的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 农场里的大多数动物都是昼夜动物，这意味着它们晚上睡觉，白天醒着

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我喜欢多彩的阵列

vocabulary.context: as your swift legs lead the footrace
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当你敏捷的双腿引领赛跑时

vocabulary.context: of dull commands like down, sit, stay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诸如"坐下"、"坐下"、"停留"等枯燥命令

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 邀请我奔跑、跳跃、玩耍！

vocabulary.definition: n. 百日草
vocabulary.context: Mom placed a zinnia into the hole and began filling the hole with soil.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈将一株百日草放入洞中，并开始用土填满洞

vocabulary.definition: n. 投掷, 铸成品, 角色分配；[化] 浇铸; 铸品
vocabulary.context: Or, as the scientists call it, 'castings.' A worm can eat its own weight in soil each day, and then it also poops that much.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者，正如科学家所说，"铸件"。一条蠕虫每天可以吃掉与自身重量相同的土壤，然后它也会排泄同样多的粪便

vocabulary.definition: adj. 衰弱的, 出故障的
vocabulary.context: "Good garden soil contains sand, but it also has broken-down rotted leaves and other stuff called organic matter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "好的花园土壤含有沙子，但也含有分解的腐烂叶子和其他称为有机物的物质

vocabulary.definition: n. 花盆, 花钵
vocabulary.context: Mom carried the flowerpots over to the garden.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈把花盆搬到花园里

vocabulary.definition: n. 一口, 满口
vocabulary.context: They grab a mouthful, then carry it down through tunnels into the soil."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们抓起一口，然后通过隧道将其带入土壤中。"

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 摇晃地悬挂着, 追求；v.t. 使摇晃地悬挂；n. 悬垂

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥斯卡跪下，将蠕虫悬挂在柔软的棕色土地上

vocabulary.definition: n. 蠕动, 蜿蜒；v.i. 蠕动, 蜿蜒前进, 摆脱；v.t. 使扭动, 扭动着爬

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这条虫子在奥斯卡的手掌中蠕动、卷曲

vocabulary.definition: adj. 干的, 无酒的, 枯燥无味的, 干燥的；v.t. 把...弄干；v.i. 变干；n. 干, 干涸
vocabulary.context: It dries out fast too - too fast for worms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它也干得很快--对于蠕虫来说太快了

vocabulary.definition: n. 科学家；[医] 科学家
vocabulary.context: Or, as the scientists call it, 'castings.' A worm can eat its own weight in soil each day, and then it also poops that much.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者，正如科学家所说，"铸件"。一条蠕虫每天可以吃掉与自身重量相同的土壤，然后它也会排泄同样多的粪便

vocabulary.definition: n. 熟铁
vocabulary.context: Eiffel had the great idea of making a wrought-iron skeleton inside the statue to hold it up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 埃菲尔有一个好主意，在雕像内部制作一个锻铁骨架来支撑它

vocabulary.definition: adj. 微红的, 略带红色的
vocabulary.context: Her reddish copper color will become a dull green in time, but I think she will always be beautiful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的红铜色随着时间的推移会变成暗绿色，但我认为她会永远美丽

vocabulary.definition: n. 魔术家, 幻术家, 术士
vocabulary.context: Some people call him the Magician of Iron.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有人称他为钢铁魔术师

vocabulary.definition: n. 支柱, 基架, 基座, 基础；v.t. 加座, 搁在台上, 支持, 提高...的地位
vocabulary.context: I'm glad the Americans don't have the money yet to finish building the pedestal where she will stand.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我很高兴美国人还没有钱来完成她将站立的基座的建造

vocabulary.definition: n. 铆钉；v.t. 用铆钉固定, 敲进去, 注目, 吸引住
vocabulary.context: Papa's workers will then bolt and rivet the sheets of copper together to make the statue.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，爸爸的工人将把铜片用螺栓和铆钉固定在一起，制成雕像

vocabulary.definition: n. 平板, 门牌, 笔记簿, 碑, 匾, 药片；[化] 片剂
vocabulary.context: She carries a tablet with the date of American independence on it: July 4, 1776.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她携带一块写有美国独立日期的石板：1776 年 7 月 4 日

vocabulary.definition: n. 楼梯, 梯子, 楼梯部分；[医] 阶梯现象
vocabulary.context: Bartholdi proudly led American officials up the spiral staircase inside the statue to her crown.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴托尔迪自豪地带领美国官员沿着雕像内的螺旋楼梯登上她的王冠

vocabulary.definition: n. 石膏, 灰泥, 安慰(缓解)用品, 膏药；v.t. 涂以灰泥, 敷以膏药, 掩饰, 使平服, 彻底击败, 减轻, 粘贴
vocabulary.context: Bartholdi was happy with his small statue, he made bigger and bigger copies out of plaster until he had one 38 feet tall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴托尔迪对他的小雕像很满意，他用石膏制作了越来越大的复制品，直到他拥有了一个 38 英尺高的雕像

vocabulary.definition: n. 官员, 公务员, 职员；adj. 公务的, 官方的, 正式的
vocabulary.context: Bartholdi proudly led American officials up the spiral staircase inside the statue to her crown.

vocabulary.definition: adj. 塞紧的, 拥挤不堪的
vocabulary.context: More and more land until, in a few days, the field is jam-packed with noisy Canada geese.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 越来越多的土地，几天后，田野里就挤满了吵闹的加拿大鹅

vocabulary.definition: n. 网, 蛛丝, 蹼, 织物, 圈套, 卷筒纸；v.i. 结网, 形成网；v.t. 织蜘蛛网于, 使落入圈套
vocabulary.context: Two black legs with webbed feet unfold from under their creamy white bellies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两条带蹼的黑色腿从乳白色的腹部下展开

vocabulary.definition: n. 登陆, 码头, 降落；[经] 上岸, 登陆, 降落
vocabulary.context: They stop flapping their wings and glide to perfect landings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们停止拍打翅膀并滑行以完美着陆

vocabulary.definition: adj. 含乳脂的, 乳脂状的, 奶油色的；[建] 含乳油的, 似乳油的
vocabulary.context: Two black legs with webbed feet unfold from under their creamy white bellies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两条带蹼的黑色腿从乳白色的腹部下展开

vocabulary.definition: n. 雁鸣, 汽车的喇叭声；v.i. 雁鸣叫, 按汽车喇叭；v.t. 揿(喇叭)
vocabulary.context: Just around the time when most of the snow has melted, spring comes honking back to my home in Spencerville, Ontario.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就在大部分积雪融化的时候，春天的声音又回到了我位于安大略省斯宾塞维尔的家

vocabulary.definition: n. 剩货, 残留物, 剩饭；adj. 残余的
vocabulary.context: They feast on bits of leftover corn in the mud and swim in large puddles of melted snow, looking for more food.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们以泥中剩下的玉米粒为食，在融雪的大水洼中游泳，寻找更多食物

vocabulary.definition: n. 脖子, 衣领, 颈；v.i. 拥抱, 拥吻, 收缩；v.t. 割颈
vocabulary.context: Their long black necks stretch out like darts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们黑色的长脖子像飞镖一样伸展

vocabulary.definition: n. 飞溅, 污点, 一点儿, 溅泼声, 色斑；v.i. 溅湿, 溅开, 飞溅；v.t. 溅, 泼, 使溅起水, 洒, 使成斑驳状
vocabulary.context: They honk to warn of danger, like when my big dog Harley splashes through the puddles, ready for a game of chase!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们鸣喇叭警告危险，就像我的大狗哈雷在水坑里溅水，准备玩追逐游戏时一样！

vocabulary.definition: n. 对, 夫妇, 数个；v.t. 使成双, 连接, 使成婚, 把...联系起来；v.i. 结合, 成婚
vocabulary.context: The geese will be leaving in another couple of days to continue on their noisy journey north.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 再过几天，大雁就会出发，继续它们喧闹的北方之旅

vocabulary.definition: n. 美食家
vocabulary.context: "You've won a week's stay here, learning survival skills, living in bamboo huts, and eating three gourmet meals a day."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你已经赢得了在这里停留一周的机会，学习生存技能，住在竹屋里，吃一日三餐。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 愚蠢, 糊涂
vocabulary.context: "What silliness," said Kavita. "This whole episode in our lives is getting sillier and sillier."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "多么愚蠢啊，"卡维塔说。 "我们生活中的这整个事件变得越来越愚蠢。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 施催眠术, 迷住, 迷惑；[医] 催眠
vocabulary.context: "I didn't know you knew how to mesmerize tigers," said Marty.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我不知道你知道如何催眠老虎，"马蒂说

vocabulary.definition: n. 救生艇
vocabulary.context: All the Danderfields and Marty and Kavita managed to squeeze into one lifeboat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有丹德菲尔德一家、马蒂和卡维塔都设法挤进一艘救生艇

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 延迟, 使延期, 缓办, 搁延；v.i. 延缓, 延缓发作
vocabulary.context: "We'll have to postpone it," said Deidre.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们不得不推迟它，"戴德丽说

vocabulary.definition: n. 巡航, 巡弋, 漫游；v. 巡航, 巡弋, 漫游
vocabulary.context: "Winning this holiday cruise for all of us by guessing the number of jellybeans in a six-foot jar is the smartest thing you've ever done," said Kavita to Deidre as she stretched out on her deck chair around the ship's swimming pool.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "通过猜测六英尺罐子里的软心豆粒糖的数量来为我们所有人赢得这次假日巡游是你做过的最聪明的事情，"卡维塔在船上游泳池周围的躺椅上躺着时对黛德丽说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 重大地, 严肃地, 庄重地
vocabulary.context: "You know that bossa nova dance contest we were all going to enter tonight?" said Maisie, shaking her head gravely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你知道我们今晚要参加的波萨诺瓦舞蹈比赛吗？"梅西严肃地摇着头说道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 清晰可见的, 显然的, 表面上的；[电] 外在的
vocabulary.context: Unfortunately, when their boat got near to shore, it became apparent to all that the beaches of this fair isle were badly infested with tigers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不幸的是，当他们的船靠近岸边时，所有人都发现这个美丽岛的海滩上老虎出没严重

vocabulary.definition: n. 期末考试, 结局, 决赛；adj. 最后的, 终极的, 决定性的
vocabulary.context: The third and final part of the prize is taking a tall ship home and learning to sail!" said Maisie.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奖品的第三个也是最后一个部分是带一艘高大的船回家并学习航行！"梅西说
